business_hours: On saturdays we do half days: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM | 8 am to 7 pm on weekdays, and: 9 AM - 1 PM (PT)
emergency_definition: the vehicle is completely immobilized due to a total high-voltage battery failure, or if the customer is seeing a red 'Thermal Runaway' or 'Pull Over Safely' warning on their central screen.
emergency_routing_rules: Transfer to our Lead Diagnostics Technician at 555-0199
non_emergency_routing_rules: please do not transfer the call to the Lead Tech.
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet -> Verify Emergency -> If Emergency: Collect Address/Name/Phone & Escalated Transfer -> If Non-Emergency: Message for Morning
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet -> Identify Caller -> Collect Inquiry -> Attempt Transfer -> Fallback Message
